title: Create an Effect library
description: Generates a TypeScript library pre-configured for Effect, with Vitest (via @effect/vitest) and a sample service + layer.

name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the library?

directory.description: A directory where the library is placed, relative to the workspace root.

tags.description: Comma-separated tags applied to the project (used for linting constraints).
